InferenceLLMConfig.description: LLM execution settings (system prompts, generation params, etc.).

system_prompt_path.description: Path to a text file containing the system prompt for the LLM. Mutually exclusive with system_prompt_mlflow_name.
system_prompt_path.title: System Prompt Path

system_prompt_mlflow_name.description: Prompt name or URI in MLflow Prompt Registry. Supported formats: 'my-prompt' (latest version), 'prompts:/my-prompt/3' (specific version, immutable), 'prompts:/my-prompt@production' (alias, mutable). Requires integrations.mlflow to be configured. Mutually exclusive with system_prompt_path.
system_prompt_mlflow_name.title: System Prompt Mlflow Name

InferenceLLMConfig.title: InferenceLLMConfig

keep_pod_on_error.description: Keep pod alive on error for debugging
keep_pod_on_error.title: Keep Pod On Error

on_interrupt.description: Cleanup cloud resources (terminate pod) when pipeline is interrupted via Ctrl+C (SIGINT).
on_interrupt.title: On Interrupt

terminate_after_retrieval.description: Terminate training pod immediately after ModelRetriever completes (before InferenceDeployer / ModelEvaluator). Saves GPU cost when inference or evaluation stages are enabled.
terminate_after_retrieval.title: Terminate After Retrieval

auto_stop_after_training.description: Automatically stop the pod (not terminate) after training completes. The pod calls RunPod API to stop itself, releasing the GPU and stopping billing. Container disk and volume data are preserved for ModelRetriever. Requires RUNPOD_API_KEY to be available. When keep_pod_on_error=true and training fails, the pod is NOT stopped.
auto_stop_after_training.title: Auto Stop After Training

ssh.description: SSH key config for pod access

RunPodInferencePodConfig.description:
RunPod Pod settings for vLLM inference runtime.

The pod docker image is pinned in
:data:`src.inference.__about__.INFERENCE_IMAGES` and resolved by
engine name at provision time — no user-facing image field.
Override via env ``RYOTENKAI_INFERENCE_IMAGE_OVERRIDE_<ENGINE>``
for CI / dev only.

name_prefix.description: Prefix for Pod name (a deterministic suffix will be added).
name_prefix.title: Name Prefix

gpu_type_ids.description: Preferred GPU types (first available will be used).
gpu_type_ids.title: Gpu Type Ids

volume_disk_gb.description: Pod Volume size in GB (mounted at /workspace; persists between stop/start of the same pod). Used only when network volume is not configured. When a network volume is also configured, RunPod gives it priority and this field is ignored.
volume_disk_gb.title: Volume Disk Gb

RunPodInferencePodConfig.title: RunPodInferencePodConfig

RunPodInferenceServeConfig.description: vLLM server settings inside the Pod container.

port.description: vLLM port inside the Pod (SSH tunnel target).
port.title: Port

RunPodInferenceServeConfig.title: RunPodInferenceServeConfig

RunPodNetworkVolumeConfig.description:
Persistent RunPod Network Volume configuration (for HF cache + inference artifacts).

Notes (RunPod semantics):
- Network volumes live independently of Pods.
- For Pods, network volumes are only available in Secure Cloud.
- Network volumes must be attached during Pod deployment.

id.description: Optional existing network volume id (preferred for stability).
id.title: Id

name.description: Human-friendly volume name (used for lookup; if not found, used for auto-create).
name.title: Name

data_center_id.description:
RunPod datacenter id for the Network Volume.

Required when `id` is not provided (RunPod REST API requires `dataCenterId` at creation time). Example: 'US-KS-2', 'EU-RO-1'.
data_center_id.title: Data Center Id

size_gb.description: Network volume size in GB (used for auto-create; can be increased later, cannot be decreased).
size_gb.title: Size Gb

RunPodNetworkVolumeConfig.title: RunPodNetworkVolumeConfig

RunPodPodsInferenceConfig.description:
Inference settings for RunPod Pods (Pod + Network Volume).

Lives under:
  providers:
    runpod:
      inference: { ... }

NOTE:
`volume` and `pod` are required only when `inference.provider='runpod'` is active.
They may be omitted when RunPod is used for training only.

volume.description: Persistent network volume settings (required for runpod inference).

pod.description: Pod runtime settings (required for runpod inference).

serve.description: vLLM serve settings inside the Pod.

RunPodPodsInferenceConfig.title: RunPodPodsInferenceConfig

RunPodSSHConfig.description: SSH settings for RunPod pods (minimal, non-interactive).

key_path.description: REQUIRED: Path to SSH private key used for RunPod pod access. RyotenkAI uses the RunPod SDK for pod lifecycle, then uses direct SSH over exposed TCP for runtime operations inside the pod.
key_path.title: Key Path

RunPodSSHConfig.title: RunPodSSHConfig

RunPodTrainingConfig.description:
Training-specific settings for RunPod provider.

New structure (aligns with single_node):
    providers:
      runpod:
        connect: ...
        cleanup: ...
        training:
          gpu_type: "NVIDIA A40"
          cloud_type: "ALL"
          container_disk_gb: 100
          volume_disk_gb: 20
          ports: "8888/http,22/tcp"
          template_id: null

The training pod image is pinned in
:data:`src.runner.__about__.RUNTIME_IMAGE` and is no longer a
user-facing config field — image versions are tied to the
release. Override via env ``RYOTENKAI_RUNTIME_IMAGE_OVERRIDE``
for CI / dev only.

gpu_type.description: REQUIRED: GPU type to request (RunPod GPU ID, e.g. 'NVIDIA A40').
gpu_type.title: Gpu Type

RunPodTrainingConfig.title: RunPodTrainingConfig

description:
Configuration for RunPod cloud provider.

Example YAML:
    providers:
      runpod:
        connect:
          ssh:
            key_path: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_runpod
        cleanup:
          auto_delete_pod: true
          keep_pod_on_error: false
          on_interrupt: true
        training:
          gpu_type: "NVIDIA A40"
          cloud_type: ALL
          # Image is pinned in src/runner/__about__.py::RUNTIME_IMAGE
          # (Phase 6.6 — no longer a YAML field).
          container_disk_gb: 100
          volume_disk_gb: 20
        inference:
          volume: { name: helix-hf-cache, data_center_id: US-KS-2, size_gb: 200 }
          # Pod image is pinned in src/inference/__about__.py::INFERENCE_IMAGES.
          pod: { gpu_count: 1, ports: ["22/tcp"] }
          serve: { port: 8000 }

inference.description: Inference settings for RunPod Pods (may be empty when unused).

title: RunPodProviderConfig
